patch.value: Research and document the July 2026 native ChatGPT/Codex plugin implementation plan

Record official OpenAI plugin and Apps SDK research as of 2026-07-11, audit the current pm-codex bundle with live installation evidence, and produce a detailed phased remediation plan without changing plugin runtime code, manifests, assets, or tests.

A focused public document dated 2026-07-11 cites current official OpenAI plugin, Apps SDK, security, testing, deployment, and submission sources; distinguishes a plugin from an app and local Codex from ChatGPT web/public distribution; records live repository and isolated cache-install findings; identifies verified gaps and non-gaps; provides target layouts, file-by-file phases, security and tool-contract requirements, test matrices, rollout gates, and proposed pm decomposition; docs index and Codex router link it; no plugin implementation artifact changes.
Future implementation can proceed from verified product terminology, current official sources, exact repository evidence, and testable acceptance gates instead of assumptions.
The repository contains an authoritative research-backed implementation plan, and the parent feature remains open and unclaimed for later approval.

value.author: codex-native-plugin-research
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: all-status searches performed for the exact July 2026 pm-codex, Apps SDK, ChatGPT plugin, official docs, and cache fallback concepts returned no existing research/documentation task. Closed pm-0c9q and pm-d97r remain prior shipped lineage; this docs-only task is the scoped first child of pm-95d7.

author: codex-native-plugin-research
message: Claim documentation-only research task; parent implementation feature remains open and unclaimed

author: codex-native-plugin-research
message: Start official-source research synthesis and repository documentation; no plugin implementation changes authorized

value.author: codex-native-plugin-research
value.text: Scope checkpoint: Current Codex CLI 0.144.1 proof shows the repo marketplace installs pm-codex 2026.7.11 and registers pm-mcp. Research has also proven the installed cache lacks dist/dependencies and its launcher falls back to npx @unbrained/pm-cli@latest; the bundle has no app wiring or hosted HTTP MCP path; commands/ is not a documented Codex plugin component; current MCP tools lack Apps SDK output schemas and safety annotations. Documentation only in this task.

value.author: codex-native-plugin-research
value.text: Validator evidence: uv run --with pyyaml python [home]/.codex/skills/.system/plugin-creator/scripts/validate_plugin.py plugins/pm-codex fails six checks. Each of pm-auditor, pm-native, and pm-release declares icon_small and icon_large as ./assets/pm-cli-small.svg relative to the skill root, but only plugins/pm-codex/assets/pm-cli-small.svg exists. Current Codex installation tolerance does not replace validator compliance.

value.note: Official-source audit and phased native ChatGPT/Codex plugin remediation plan
Public Codex plugin status clarification and implementation-plan link
Documentation index route for ChatGPT/Codex plugin implementers
Documentation links and skills quality gate

value.author: codex-native-plugin-research
value.text: Official-source evidence (opened live 2026-07-11): OpenAI Codex Plugins and Build Plugins; ChatGPT Build an app and Submit plugins; Apps SDK overview, tool planning, MCP server, authentication, deployment, ChatGPT connection, testing, MCP Apps compatibility, security/privacy, reference, and changelog; Secure MCP Tunnel; and Codex changelog. The report links each canonical official URL and records the observed developers.openai.com to learn.chatgpt.com redirects.

value.author: codex-native-plugin-research
value.text: Verification evidence: pm-linked pnpm build passed; pm-linked pnpm quality:docs-skills passed; pnpm quality:static passed, including static quality and the 14-surface token-budget gate; git diff --check passed; pm health --check-only --summary passed with zero warnings; pm validate history_drift passed with zero drift. Its only warning is pre-existing repository debt: 278 legacy closed items missing resolution metadata. Changed product files are documentation only: docs/CHATGPT_CODEX_PLUGIN_IMPLEMENTATION.md, docs/CODEX_PLUGIN.md, and docs/README.md; plugin runtime, manifest, assets, and tests remain untouched.

patch.value: Documented the verified native Codex status, installed-runtime and validator defects, ChatGPT Apps SDK gaps, architecture decision, phased remediation, security requirements, verification matrix, and pm execution plan.

Added a dated 775-line official-source implementation plan plus docs router updates; live isolated install evidence distinguishes the working Codex package from the missing self-contained runtime and optional ChatGPT app; all linked and broader documentation gates passed.
Completed the research-only official-source audit and detailed implementation plan; linked docs and all scoped verification gates pass, with no plugin implementation changes.
